message:
test(e2e): add --robot-palette command tests (ntm-yyvm)

Add 6 E2E tests for the --robot-palette command:
- TestRobotPaletteBasic: validates JSON structure and required fields
- TestRobotPaletteCategoryFilter: tests --palette-category flag
- TestRobotPaletteSearchFilter: tests --palette-search flag
- TestRobotPaletteSessionFilter: tests --palette-session flag
- TestRobotPaletteAgentHints: verifies _agent_hints presence
- TestRobotPaletteCombinedFilters: tests multiple filters together

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
